prompt: Create a tall vertical inspirational art wallpaper in a serene Monument Valley–inspired style, soft healing fantasy architecture, aspect ratio 9:16. The scene is an impossible pastel city of stacked geometric towers, arches, bridges, stairways, terraces, canals, and small domed pavilions floating in mist, rendered in delicate isometric perspective with clean minimalist forms. Use a warm dawn palette of peach, cream, pale sand, mint green, turquoise, lavender, and deep indigo shadows. At the upper right, a monumental cream-colored arched gate stands high above the city, glowing with sunrise light; the orange sun sits inside the arch, and a long white staircase leads toward it. Include a tiny solitary human figure standing on a mid-level terrace for scale. Add subtle details: thin waterfalls flowing down dark blue interior walls, glowing windows, small gold finials, a bare pink-blossom tree on a balcony, a crescent moon in the hazy sky, and two tiny white birds. Compose the poster with negative space on the left for typography. Add exactly 6 visible text blocks: top-left small serif text “VOL. 02” above “2026”; large vertical Chinese headline 黎明前的黑暗 in dark blue-gray; beneath it a short Chinese quote 不是惩罚，是宇宙在准备更壮丽的日出。; a small cursive English quote Before dawn, a greater sunrise is being prepared.; lower-left small text “2026 DAWN” with a vertical Chinese phrase 向光而行; and bottom-right small text “VOL.02”. Use refined editorial poster typography, elegant spacing, subtle paper grain, atmospheric fog, soft bloom, cinematic morning light, quiet meditative mood, ultra-detailed yet minimalist, no borders, no photorealism.
